summary: Refine the rust-diffforge audio widget so the idle recorder is a graphite circular logo-only control that expands horizontally for push-to-talk recording and transcription.

review_items.summary: The recorder widget keeps a compact circular logo-only layout with a transparent idle window surface while idle, setup, warming, missing, or error states are active, and switches to a same-height expanded layout only while push-to-talk is arming, recording, or transcription processing is active.

During push-to-talk recording the expanded graphite widget keeps the Diffforge logo at the leading edge and shows a denser deterministic audio visualizer to the right, mixing actual input level with animated low-noise motion so the bars remain lively without idle labels, status copy, recorder controls, or the idle circular shell.

The Audio setup input meter uses additional bars and staggered animation variables so quiet or noisy rooms still show a responsive, high-signal microphone preview while preserving the same underlying audio stats; when no input signal is present, the bars drop into a calmer low-energy state instead of looking fully active.

After push-to-talk release, while local Whisper or cloud transcription is processing, the expanded graphite widget keeps the denser animated audio bars visible and replaces the leading logo with the loading treatment until the widget returns to ready or error state; the bars are revealed after the resize frame to reduce opening jank.

When transcription completes or returns to the start state, the expanded audio widget keeps the focused window size briefly and plays the audio bar reveal in reverse before resizing back to the compact logo-only state.
The audio-widget window receives the Tauri set-size permission so the frontend can resize only this separate recorder window between compact and focused dimensions.

This visual proposal does not otherwise change microphone capture, transcription providers, transcript storage, or focused text insertion behavior; native capture pre-roll is tracked separately by proposal.rust.audio_remove_vad_persistent_widget.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, hosted API, auth, billing, or cross-project contract change is required.

patches.summary: Render transparent idle logo chrome, denser focused recording bars with deterministic low-noise motion, focused processing loader, use an animation-frame-staged reveal after resizing the widget window, and hold the focused layout long enough to play a reverse close animation before compacting.

Add transparent widget root and idle shell handling, graphite focused widget styling, logo badge styling, transform-based recording/input bars with staggered animation, processing loader styles, and reverse close transitions.
Allow the audio-widget window to call the Tauri window set-size API for compact/focused state transitions.

compatibility.notes: The change is local to the desktop recorder window. Existing push-to-talk shortcut handling, Audio tab setup, transcription providers, and transcript publication remain available.

data_handling.sends_audio_to_remote_service: unchanged from the selected transcription provider behavior

tests.summary: Validate Tauri configuration and command integration.
